rulings.Case Title: JOHN MASERO et al VS. HONEYWELL INTERNATIONAL, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appoint Michael Masero As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 13, 2014 in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion to appoint Michael Masero as successor-in-interest to, and substitute successor-in-interest for, deceased plaintiff and for leave to file first amended complaint is continued on the court's own motion to August 19, 2014. = (503/TLJ)
